content.text:
The download actually succeeded — the file was already on disk and yt-dlp skipped re-downloading it. Two things to note:

1. **Extra `URL` argument**: You had a literal `URL` at the end of your command, which yt-dlp tried to process as a second URL. Remove it:
   ```
   yt-dlp https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=5X5CzBFlBbQ --extract-audio --audio-format mp3
   ```

2. **Deno JS challenge warnings**: These are non-fatal — yt-dlp still found a usable format (format 251) and downloaded it. If you want to suppress these or get higher quality formats, update yt-dlp:
   ```
   yt-dlp -U
   ```

The file `Miyagi & Эндшпиль feat. Рем Дигга - Don't Cry (Official Audio) [5X5CzBFlBbQ].mp3` is in your current directory.
